case_title: RAFAEL ISLAS VS. MULTI PURPORSE SERVICES, INC. A CALIF. CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISLAS, RAFAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MULTI PURPORSE SERVICES, INC. A CALIF. CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISLAS, RAFAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULTI PURPORSE SERVICES, INC. A CALIF. CORP. $5,925.05 PRINCIPAL, $78.81 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,124.16, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
